allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'],'|',f['id'],'|',f['type']\) for f in d['data']['table']['fields']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'],'|',f['type'],'| link_table' if f['type']=='link' else ''\) for f in d['data']['fields']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'],'|',f['type'],'| multiple' if f.get\('multiple'\) else ''\) for f in d['data']['fields']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'],'|',f['type'],'|',f.get\('link_table',''\),'|',f.get\('aggregate',''\),'| multiple' if f.get\('multiple'\) else ''\) for f in d['data']['fields']]")
